description: You are the navigator of a nuclear submarine operating in the Mediterranean Sea. GPS is jammed, and you need to pre-calculate the compass bearings of specific bright stars to minimize periscope exposure time during a celestial fix. Configure Stellarium for the operational area (34.00° N, 18.00° E, 0 meters altitude) on November 15, 2024, at 03:00 UTC. The display must show an unobstructed sea horizon with the azimuthal grid and constellation lines enabled. Capture screenshots of Sirius, Polaris, and Capella to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Generate a briefing document at ~/Desktop/periscope_fix_plan.txt that includes the operational area (Mediterranean Sea), the planned fix date/time, and the names of the three target stars. Close Stellarium upon completion.
